description: A compact curated set of Yomira-ready source definitions for popular manga, manhwa, and manhua sites.

manga_list.link: div.text > h3 > a@href || h3.title a@href || h3 a@href
manga_list.title: div.text > h3 > a@text || h3.title a@text || h3 a@text

definitions.description: MangaBox-style source definition normalized from the existing MangaNato config and current Keiyoushi metadata.

definitions.description: Madara source definition normalized from Keiyoushi metadata and updated for the current AJAX chapter holder markup.

definitions.description: English comics archive with simple catalog, detail, chapter, and direct image selectors. Browser Verification is required before browsing or reading.
definitions.name: ReadAllComics

provenance.notes: Selectors are based on local Keiyoushi analysis and current upstream source metadata.

definitions.description: English comics catalog with advanced genre, status, and year filters. Browser Verification is required before browsing or reading.
definitions.name: ReadComicOnline

provenance.notes: Selectors and filter values are based on local Keiyoushi analysis and current upstream source metadata.

definitions.description: Selector source definition normalized from the current Keiyoushi Weeb Central HttpSource metadata.
definitions.name: Weeb Central

definitions.description: AllManga manga/manhwa catalog using the AllAnime GraphQL API for browsing, details, and chapter metadata. Chapter pages use Browser Verification's short-lived rendered-page snapshot path when the site withholds page URLs from native HTTP.

chapters.body: {"variables":{"id":"{id}","showId":"{show_id}"},"query":"query ($id: String!, $showId: String!) { manga(_id: $id) { _id name availableChaptersDetail } episodeInfos(showId: $showId, episodeNumStart: 0, episodeNumEnd: 9999) { episodeIdNum notes uploadDates } }"}

details.body: {"variables":{"id":"{id}"},"query":"query ($id: String!) { manga(_id: $id) { _id name thumbnail description authors genres tags status altNames englishName nativeName chapterCount availableChapters availableChaptersDetail averageScore rating countryOfOrigin type } }"}

latest.body: {"variables":{"search":{"query":null,"sortBy":null,"genres":null,"excludeGenres":null,"isManga":true,"allowAdult":false,"allowUnknown":false},"size":24,"page":{page},"translationType":"sub","countryOrigin":"ALL"},"query":"query ($search: SearchInput, $size: Int, $page: Int, $translationType: VaildTranslationTypeMangaEnumType, $countryOrigin: VaildCountryOriginEnumType) { mangas(search: $search, limit: $size, page: $page, translationType: $translationType, countryOrigin: $countryOrigin) { edges { _id name thumbnail englishName } } }"}

popular.body: {"variables":{"type":"manga","size":24,"dateRange":0,"page":{page},"allowAdult":false,"allowUnknown":false},"query":"query ($type: VaildPopularTypeEnumType!, $size: Int!, $page: Int, $dateRange: Int, $allowAdult: Boolean, $allowUnknown: Boolean) { queryPopular(type: $type, size: $size, dateRange: $dateRange, page: $page, allowAdult: $allowAdult, allowUnknown: $allowUnknown) { recommendations { anyCard { _id name thumbnail englishName } } } }"}

search.body: {"variables":{"search":{"query":{query_json},"sortBy":null,"genres":null,"excludeGenres":null,"isManga":true,"allowAdult":false,"allowUnknown":false},"size":24,"page":{page},"translationType":"sub","countryOrigin":"ALL"},"query":"query ($search: SearchInput, $size: Int, $page: Int, $translationType: VaildTranslationTypeMangaEnumType, $countryOrigin: VaildCountryOriginEnumType) { mangas(search: $search, limit: $size, page: $page, translationType: $translationType, countryOrigin: $countryOrigin) { edges { _id name thumbnail englishName } } }"}

definitions.name: AllManga

definitions.description: MangaDex Source Definition powered by Yomira's built-in MangaDex connector engine.
definitions.name: MangaDex

listingSubtitles.popular_new: New titles gaining traction on MangaDex

definitions.description: MKissa manga/manhwa catalog using the AllAnime GraphQL API for browsing, details, and chapter metadata. Chapter pages use Browser Verification's short-lived rendered-page snapshot path when the site withholds page URLs from native HTTP.

chapters.body: {"variables":{"id":"{id}","showId":"{show_id}"},"query":"query ($id: String!, $showId: String!) { manga(_id: $id) { _id name availableChaptersDetail } episodeInfos(showId: $showId, episodeNumStart: 0, episodeNumEnd: 9999) { episodeIdNum notes uploadDates } }"}

details.body: {"variables":{"id":"{id}"},"query":"query ($id: String!) { manga(_id: $id) { _id name thumbnail description authors genres tags status altNames englishName nativeName chapterCount availableChapters availableChaptersDetail averageScore rating countryOfOrigin type } }"}

latest.body: {"variables":{"search":{"query":null,"sortBy":null,"genres":null,"excludeGenres":null,"isManga":true,"allowAdult":false,"allowUnknown":false},"size":24,"page":{page},"translationType":"sub","countryOrigin":"ALL"},"query":"query ($search: SearchInput, $size: Int, $page: Int, $translationType: VaildTranslationTypeMangaEnumType, $countryOrigin: VaildCountryOriginEnumType) { mangas(search: $search, limit: $size, page: $page, translationType: $translationType, countryOrigin: $countryOrigin) { edges { _id name thumbnail englishName } } }"}

popular.body: {"variables":{"type":"manga","size":24,"dateRange":0,"page":{page},"allowAdult":false,"allowUnknown":false},"query":"query ($type: VaildPopularTypeEnumType!, $size: Int!, $page: Int, $dateRange: Int, $allowAdult: Boolean, $allowUnknown: Boolean) { queryPopular(type: $type, size: $size, dateRange: $dateRange, page: $page, allowAdult: $allowAdult, allowUnknown: $allowUnknown) { recommendations { anyCard { _id name thumbnail englishName } } } }"}

search.body: {"variables":{"search":{"query":{query_json},"sortBy":null,"genres":null,"excludeGenres":null,"isManga":true,"allowAdult":false,"allowUnknown":false},"size":24,"page":{page},"translationType":"sub","countryOrigin":"ALL"},"query":"query ($search: SearchInput, $size: Int, $page: Int, $translationType: VaildTranslationTypeMangaEnumType, $countryOrigin: VaildCountryOriginEnumType) { mangas(search: $search, limit: $size, page: $page, translationType: $translationType, countryOrigin: $countryOrigin) { edges { _id name thumbnail englishName } } }"}
